name: Sugared Asparagus
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Fresh asparagus (about 4 cups), cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet over medium-high heat, melt butter and dissolve brown sugar.
2. Add asparagus and sauté for 2 minutes.
3. Stir in chicken broth; bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and cover the skillet. Simmer for 8-10 minutes or until asparagus is crisp-tender.
5. Remove asparagus to a serving dish and keep warm.
6. Cook sauce, uncovered, until reduced by half.
7. Pour over asparagus and serve immediately.
